work_unit: vision-adapter SH-VIS-M-001 O(n²) binary string fix
situation: audit-2026-07-08-037 finding SH-VIS-M-001 (medium): preprocessForVL/compressFallback 用 `binary += String.fromCharCode(bytes[i])` 循环转 base64，对 >1MB 压缩输出最坏 O(n²) 字符串重分配。派生 route-fix（不触及 public-interfaces.txt → 复用 opt-vision-1783212856）。
action: 在 opt-vision-1783212856 worktree 内新增 uint8ToBase64 helper（预分配 Array+单次 join+btoa），替换两处调用点。cp-guard 跳过（worktree HEAD ba3a21b 已有前轮未合并改动），走 case-104 直编 wt+wt 内 commit 通道。
outcome_evidence: commit 090083d on auto/opt-vision-1783212856, pushed ba3a21b..090083d to origin. diff: +14/-8 lines, 1 file. Helper replaces 2 instances of O(n²) += loop with Array prealloc+join.
next_suggestion: 派生 SH-SIDE-L-001 (low severity onDeleteText index-vs-id) — 同样走 opt-sidepanel-1782907225 worktree
若 L-001 也 merged/rejected，audit-cycle-state.status → cycle-complete，下轮触发新全量审计

audit_findings.finding: Binary string accumulation via += in loop is O(n²) worst case for large compressed outputs (>1MB). V8 may amortize but not guaranteed in service worker memory-constrained context.
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with Array prealloc + single join + btoa (uint8ToBase64 helper). Applied in this case.
